name: Project Management
summary: Project and branch management system. Handles project CRUD with git initialization, native folder selection, and git branch listing and switching.
goals: Manage project entities with create, list, and delete operations
Initialize git repositories for new projects
List and switch between git branches
Provide native OS folder picker for project path selection

acceptanceCriteria.when: user creates a new project with a folder path
acceptanceCriteria.then: the project is saved and appears in the project list

acceptanceCriteria.given: A project with multiple branches exists
acceptanceCriteria.when: user switches to a different branch
acceptanceCriteria.then: git checkout is executed and the branch state updates

end-to-end.when: user creates a project and switches branches
end-to-end.then: operations complete successfully and UI reflects the changes

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
